name: Bitcoin Depot Inc.
summary: PART I Our Business Business Overview Bitcoin Depot owns and operates the largest network of Bitcoin ATMs (BTMs or, kiosks) across North America where customers can buy and sell Bitcoin. Bitcoin Depot helps power the digital economy for users of cash. Our mission is to bring Crypto to the Masses TM .
